title: Sub-workflow parameter not receiving expected value
symptom: The parameter 'to_send_to_xx' in the sub-workflow is not receiving any data, resulting in it being null instead of the expected boolean value.
not_this_if: Parameter is correctly receiving data in other workflows
root_cause: This issue occurs due to a bug in how n8n handles the initial state of parameters when passing data from a master workflow to a sub-workflow. The parameter may not be correctly initialized, leading to it being null instead of the expected value.
fix_steps: Toggle the parameter 'to_send_to_xx' off and then back on in the sub-workflow settings.
Save the changes and re-run the master workflow.
agent_instruction: Toggle the 'to_send_to_xx' parameter in the sub-workflow settings and re-run the master workflow.
